category_sources: GNOME wiki archive describes gtk-vnc as a VNC viewer widget for GTK.
source_facts.description says gtk-vnc is a VNC viewer widget for GTK.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME GitLab project and GNOME wiki archive use gtk-vnc.
docs_sources: GNOME wiki archive is the official project documentation page with about, use, download, and links.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GNOME GitLab project.
repo_sources: GNOME wiki archive gives the official git clone URL for GNOME/gtk-vnc.
source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME GitLab source project.
tags_sources: Official GNOME wiki archive notes use by GNOME and virtualization clients.
source_facts.description supports VNC, GTK, and widget tags.
